name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
feat(plugin): bridge native-client sessions in as OpenWatchParty room hosts

Adds an admin-gated hostbridge so sessions that can't run the injected
browser client (e.g. Fladder on Android TV) can still host a watch party:
HostBridgeManager subscribes to ISessionManager's playback events and
SessionHostBridge speaks the normal browser-host WebSocket protocol to the
session server on that session's behalf. Host-only by design — receivers
still join the resulting room themselves through the existing OWP UI, no
new push channel to browsers. JWT minting extracted into SessionServerAuth
so both the bridge and the existing /Token endpoint share it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
